title: Evidence-anchored structural conjecture
assumptions: Empirical scope anchored to SPY US Equity.
Regime labels correspond to empirically observed states
Observed feature differences are mapped consistently to theorem notation

tasks.name: covariance_symmetry
tasks.rationale: Basic symmetry check for spot-vol covariance style terms.

tasks.name: quadratic_form_nonnegative
tasks.rationale: Any squared coupling residual should remain nonnegative.

tasks.name: variance_of_linear_combination
tasks.rationale: A variance-style quadratic form should remain nonnegative under admissible coupling assumptions.

tasks.name: regime_gap_identity
tasks.rationale: Checks algebraic coherence of regime-difference decomposition used in pair-linkage narratives.

tasks.name: zero_spread_baseline
tasks.rationale: Provides a simple baseline zero-point regularity check for local spread/coupling expansions.

notes: These are symbolic consistency checks for pair-linkage theorems.
Packet assumptions are threaded into symbolic execution so rho bounds and positivity can actually be used.
